creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Tue, Feb 29, 2000 at 03:19:06AM +0900, R. Imura wrote:
> > I think it should be a separate port. Not everyone wants documentation..
> 
> Ok, would you create the c++ reference port, too?
> If you won't, that's ok. You can get rid of the documentation from
> my port, anyway.

Actually, now that I've gone and made a port of this, I realized a couple
unsettling problems. So I've decided not to make this a separate port. I
will generate a mechanism to install the documentation as requested, built
into the devel/kdevelop[-i18n] ports.

> They are used by EXTRA_PATCHES.
> Ignore them. :)
> Should be in 1.1.

Ok. I will remove DISTFILES from your port, since it is no longer needed.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
